rulings.Case Title: SARA DURYEA VS. BANK OF AMERICA et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Expunge Recroded Lis Pendens
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, August 15, 2012, line 1. DEFENDANT BANK OF AMERICA's Motion To Expunge Recroded Lis Pendens. Grant, no opposition filed. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: LA SALLE HEIGHTS HOMEOWNERS ASSOCIATION VS. EDWARD C. ELEY et al
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, August 15, 2012, line 2. PLAINTIFF LA SALLE HEIGHTS HOMEOWNERS ASSOCIATION's MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT. Deny, moving party failed to shift burden re compliance with CC 1367.4(b) and or (c), CC&R 8.2 and 8.3. = (501/REQ)
Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, August 15, 2012, line 4. DEFENDANT JEAN HU's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT. Off calendar, dismissal filed on Aug. 3, 2012. = (501/REQ)
